notes: Wizard layout revert + firmware-version and OTA-check in wizard banner. (1) Sequential wizard steps (0→1→2→3) restored, one visible at a time — v1.0.40 over-interpreted 'all in one page' as the whole wizard when only the speaker list was meant. Kept the speaker-list improvements: names only, tap-or-knob to select, scrollIntoView on knob highlight, taller list (~10 zones fit without scrolling). (2) Wizard banner now shows current firmware version + a 'check for updates' pill — visible even when a board is stuck inside the wizard, so you don't need to escape to the landing to see version state or trigger an OTA. Reflects updater status (checking / downloading / rebooting / v-X ready) live. (3) Sketchbook hygiene: development moved out of iCloud-synced ~/Documents/Arduino to ~/Arduino so library files can't be silently evicted mid-build. Firmware behavior unchanged from v1.0.40 in every other way.
